sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15517" key="a)rrhfo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρρη-φόρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, at Athens, <sense id="n15517.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">maiden who carried the symbols</tr_> of Athena Polias in procession, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:27:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.27.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.839c</biblScope></bibl>, etc. (wrongly expl. by Gramm. as shortd. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀρρητο-</foreign>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀρρη-,</foreign> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἕρση</ref></xr>, q.v.; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἑρσηφόροι</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
